title: ProtoArt Heat Pumps
description: Matterbridge plugin for ProtoArt ME_CN105_ATA_WIFI heat pumps

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable debug logging for the plugin

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)

hosts.title: ProtoArt hosts (comma-separated)
hosts.description: IP addresses of ProtoArt units, e.g. 192.168.0.151,192.168.0.152

deviceNames.title: Device names (comma-separated, optional)
deviceNames.description: e.g. Living Room,Hallway — matches host order
